subject: docs(claude): document data access pattern as architectural decision
body:
Frontend must use the backend API for all data operations — no direct
Supabase queries. Supabase client is auth-only (JWT session tokens).
Documents the rationale and marks it as intentional for future sessions.

Tags: documentation, architecture
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: documentation
Semver: patch
